title: espeletia glandulosa
intro: Espeletia glandulosa, also known as the 'Ratoncito', is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, native to the high-altitude Andean regions of South America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce fever, and combat infections. The health benefits of Espeletia glandulosa include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support the immune system, making it a valuable remedy in traditional medicine. Espeletia glandulosa is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are typically consumed to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
